description: AMD's open-source framework for running generative AI applications locally on AMD hardware, with specialized optimizations for Ryzen AI processors with NPU support.
rules: GAIA agents inherit from the base Agent class in src/gaia/agents/base/agent.py
Tools are registered using the @tool decorator from gaia.agents.base.tools
LLM inference runs locally via Lemonade Server on AMD NPU/GPU hardware
The default model is Qwen3.5-35B-A3B-GGUF for agent tasks
All new features require tests in tests/ and documentation in docs/ (.mdx format)
Use 'uv pip install -e .[dev]' for development setup
The code index (gaia.code_index) provides semantic search over repositories using local FAISS + Lemonade embeddings
Use 'gaia index' CLI to build a semantic code index; 'gaia index search <query>' to query it
CodeIndexSDK accepts CodeIndexConfig with repo_path, index_git_history, index_prs, and max_files options
